name: Pure Harvest Corporate Group, Inc.
summary: Pure Harvest Corporate Group, Inc. focuses on the acquisition and operation of licensed medical and recreational marijuana dispensaries, cultivation facilities, and production facilities. It also focuses on providing cannabis and hemp-derived health and wellness products; and applying education, research and development, and technology to various sectors. The company was formerly known as Pure Harvest Cannabis Group, Inc. and changed its name to Pure Harvest Corporate Group, Inc. in June 2020. Pure Harvest Corporate Group, Inc. was founded in 2004 and is based in Greenwood Village, Colorado.
